prompt: Create a highly detailed dark sci-fi anime illustration of a lone cyberpunk elf girl standing on an industrial metal platform in front of an enormous biomechanical war machine. The character is a petite blue-haired elf girl with pale skin, long pointed ears, a short chin-length bob haircut with bangs, red eyes, and a calm, slightly melancholic expression. She wears elaborate black gothic cyber-armor: spiked segmented shoulder pieces, a black armored bodice with red glowing jewel-like nodes, chainmail-like mechanical plating, torn sheer black skirt panels, asymmetrical thigh straps, sheer stockings, and sharp black high-heeled armored boots. Add small hair ornaments and many tiny metallic details, chains, buckles, spikes, skull motifs, and red accents throughout the outfit. Behind her, place a colossal black insectoid/mecha battleship with horn-like fins and glowing red seams, filling most of the background and dwarfing the character. The environment is a towering dystopian shipyard or megastructure with cranes, scaffolding, pipes, hanging chains, catwalks, warning signs, and layered industrial platforms fading into cold blue haze. Use a vertical portrait composition, full-body view, character slightly right of center, low-angle cinematic perspective, with the giant machine looming diagonally behind her. Lighting should be moody and atmospheric: cool misty daylight from the upper left, deep shadows, subtle rim light, and scattered crimson glows from machinery and armor. Style: ultra-detailed anime concept art, dark fantasy cyberpunk, intricate mechanical design, sharp linework, painterly realism, high contrast, metallic textures, dramatic scale, no extra characters, no watermark.
